hooks.command: f="${CLAUDE_FILE_PATH:-}"; case "$f" in *.env|*.env.*|*.key|*.pem|*credentials*|*service_role*) echo "BLOCK: refused to write secret-like file: $f" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

cmd="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_command:-}"; case "$cmd" in *"prisma migrate dev"*|*"prisma migrate deploy"*|*"prisma db push"*) bash "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/scripts/check-migration-safety.sh" >&2 || { echo "BLOCK: destructive prisma migration detected — set ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE_MIGRATION=1 to override (after backup + review)." >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac
f="${CLAUDE_FILE_PATH:-}"; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.md|*.css) [ -f "$f" ] && npx --no-install prettier --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ;; esac
